title: azure-rate-limit-deepseek-continued
description:
This is a continuation of azure-rate-limit-deepseek-persistence. In this window, another long-running persona call failed with the same explicit provider-side quota error on `azure/deepseek-v4-pro`: a `test_implementer` run for story 15 ended at 2026-05-30T03:08:42.997388+00:00 after 868.143 seconds with `litellm.RateLimitError: AzureException RateLimitError - Rate limit exceeded. Quota request exceeds the tokens limit.` The failure is diagnosable from the error text itself and matches the already-escalated pattern from the prior three watcher intervals.

The immediate impact in this slice is one more blocked/failed persona attempt rather than a full factory stall. Queue snapshots still show active movement: `tests_red` decreased from 30 to 28 while `dev_in_progress` increased from 1 to 3, and four new ticks started in close succession. Spend was broadly flat in-window, so the current evidence points to a persistent provider-capacity problem affecting some runs, not to a generalized halt of processing.

Possible explanations remain limited to provider-side quota/rate limiting or factory use of that provider/model path for this persona; the evidence in this bundle does not distinguish further. Because the pattern has now persisted across four consecutive watcher-note intervals with the same clear error signature, it remains an active infrastructure concern even though overall queue processing continues.

evidence.summary_excerpt: The previously escalated Azure deepseek-v4-pro quota/rate-limit failure continued again in this window, with another long test_implementer run on story 15 failing with the same explicit token-limit error.

evidence.excerpt: test_implementer story 15 failed after 868.143s on azure/deepseek-v4-pro: "litellm.RateLimitError: AzureException RateLimitError - Rate limit exceeded. Quota request exceeds the tokens limit. Requested tokens: 0."
{"noteworthy":"One failed test_implementer run on story 15 repeated the same explicit Azure RateLimitError/token quota exceeded failure already escalated in prior notes."}

{"noteworthy":"Latest queue snapshot is skewed toward tests_red at 28/42 (~67%), but recent snapshots in this same window show tests_red decreasing as dev_in_progress increases, which looks like active processing rather than a clear stall."}
tick_start for app sacrifice; one of four new ticks started in-window with no matching tick_end yet.

escalation_reason: Persistent Azure deepseek-v4-pro quota/rate-limit failures have continued across four consecutive watcher-note intervals, most recently a test_implementer run for story 15 that burned 868.143s before failing with the same explicit token-limit error. L3 judgment is needed because this is a clear provider/model-path infrastructure pattern that remains unresolved while continuing to disrupt persona runs.
